title: Sick Day Spud
description: Comfort food to soothe a sick day. A warm, comforting potato dish to help you feel better.
instructions: Peel and cube the potato, then boil in water until tender.
In a separate pot, combine the broth and cream. Heat over medium heat until warm.
In a baking dish, combine the cooked potato, cubed bread, and warm broth mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
